findingDetails.summary: Parent spec body still says In Progress/Draft and keeps resolved questions in OPEN QUESTIONS while frontmatter and graph metadata say the packet is complete and questions are answered.
findingDetails.remediation: Update parent status and phase map to complete, and move/remove answered open questions.
